evidence.source_title: Understanding the Iran-Contra Affairs — Brown University
evidence.description: Kangarloo participated in the February 1986 meeting in Germany with Oliver North, Ghorbanifar, and Hakim to discuss weapons transfers and hostage releases.

editorial_notes: Key Iranian negotiator. Met with North in Germany February 1986. Pushed for advanced air-to-air missiles for Iran's F-14s.
